Phenotype Distribution of Gardnerella spp. Strains

Spencer Toth

2026-03-16

library(tidyverse)
library(phylosignal)
library(broom)
library(rstatix)
library(adephylo)
library(ape)
library(phylobase)
library(formattable)
library(corrplot)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(grid)
library(gridGraphics)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr) 
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
`%!in%` <- negate(`%in%`)

Import and Prepare input files

Import files and edit strain names

strainIDs <- read.csv("/Users/spencertoth/Desktop/Research/gardnerella_phylogenetic_signal/gardnerella_pathogenic_phenotypes/strain_phylogeny/strainIDs.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
strainIDs$strain <- as.character(strainIDs$strain)

# Growth Rates
carrying_capacity_data_file <- read_csv("../formatted_phenotype_data/carrying_capacity.csv")
growth_rate_data_file <- read_csv("../formatted_phenotype_data/growth_rate.csv")

# Biofilm formation
percent_biofilm_od_data_file  <- read_csv("../formatted_phenotype_data/percent_biofilm_od.csv")
safranin_od_data_file <- read_csv("../formatted_phenotype_data/safranin_od.csv")

# Minimum pH Growth
pH_growth_data_file <- read_csv("../formatted_phenotype_data/pH_growth.csv")

# Metronidazole MIC
metro_mic_data_file <- read.csv("../formatted_phenotype_data/metro_mic.csv")


#Update names with genomospecies 
update_strain_gs <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
    left_join(select(strainIDs, strain, genomospecies), by = c("Strain" = "strain")) %>%
    mutate(Strain = paste0(Strain, "_", genomospecies)) %>%
    select(-any_of(c("genomospecies", "strain")))
}

# Carrying Capacity 
carrying_capacity_data_file <- update_strain_gs(carrying_capacity_data_file)
n_strains <- length(unique(carrying_capacity_data_file$Strain))
n_observations <-length(carrying_capacity_data_file$maxOD)

carrying_capacity_means <- carrying_capacity_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n(), mean_maxOD = mean(maxOD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(mean_maxOD) %>%
  mutate(Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain))


#Growth Rate
growth_rate_data_file <- update_strain_gs(growth_rate_data_file)

n_strains <- length(unique(growth_rate_data_file$Strain))
n_observations <-length(growth_rate_data_file$mSlope)

growth_rate_means <- growth_rate_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n(),mean_growth_rate = mean(mSlope, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%   
  arrange(mean_growth_rate) %>%
  mutate(Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain))


# Percent Biofilm  
percent_biofilm_od_data_file <- update_strain_gs(percent_biofilm_od_data_file)
percent_biofilm_transformed <- percent_biofilm_od_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain),
        arcsq_mPercentOD = asin(sqrt(mPercentOD/100))) 
n_strains <- length(unique(percent_biofilm_transformed$Strain))
n_observations <-length(percent_biofilm_transformed$arcsq_mPercentOD)
percent_biofilm_means <- percent_biofilm_transformed %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n(), mean_arcsq_mPercentOD = mean(arcsq_mPercentOD, na.rm = TRUE), 
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(mean_arcsq_mPercentOD) %>%
  mutate(Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain))

# Safranin (OD450) 
safranin_od_data_file <- update_strain_gs(safranin_od_data_file)

n_strains <- length(unique(safranin_od_data_file$Strain))
n_observations <-length(safranin_od_data_file$mSafOD)

safranin_means <- safranin_od_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n(), mean_safranin_od = mean(mSafOD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%  # adjust
  arrange(mean_safranin_od) %>%
  mutate(Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain))


# MDZ-MIC
metro_mic_data_file <- update_strain_gs(metro_mic_data_file)

metro_mic_filtered <- metro_mic_data_file %>%
  filter(!grepl("*read",
                MIC, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(MIC = case_when(
    grepl("^>256$", MIC) ~ 257,  # Numeric 257, not string "257"
    TRUE ~ as.numeric(MIC)       # Convert all to numeric
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(MIC))  # Drop any conversion failures

n_strains <- length(unique(metro_mic_filtered$Strain))
n_observations <-length(metro_mic_filtered$MIC)

mic_means <- metro_mic_filtered %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n(), mean_mic = mean(MIC, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%  # adjust
  arrange(mean_mic) %>%
  mutate(Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain))


mic_numeric <- metro_mic_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    MIC_num = case_when(
      grepl("^>256$", MIC) ~ 257,
      grepl("^[0-9]+$", MIC) ~ as.numeric(MIC),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    MIC_original = case_when(
      MIC_num == 257 ~ ">256",
      TRUE ~ ifelse(is.na(MIC_num), MIC, as.character(MIC_num))
    ),
    resistant = MIC_num >= 32
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(MIC_num))


mic_plot_data <- mic_numeric  

strain_counts <- mic_plot_data %>%
  count(Strain, sort = FALSE) %>%  
  arrange(n)  # sort least to greatest
mic_plot_data$Strain_sorted <- factor(mic_plot_data$Strain, 
                                     levels = strain_counts$Strain)


# Calculate MIC90 per strain (90th percentile of MIC values)
mic90_results <- mic_numeric %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(
    n_isolates = n(),
    MIC50 = round(quantile(MIC_num, 0.5, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    MIC90 = round(quantile(MIC_num, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    isolates_ge_MIC90 = sum(MIC_num >= MIC90, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(MIC90))

mic90_results
## # A tibble: 21 × 5
##    Strain       n_isolates MIC50 MIC90 isolates_ge_MIC90
##    <chr>             <int> <dbl> <dbl>             <int>
##  1 AMD_GS5               4  257    257                 4
##  2 C0011E4_GS1           4  257    257                 4
##  3 C0040C2_GS3           4  257    257                 4
##  4 C0056B5_GS8           4  257    257                 4
##  5 C0093B3_GS4           4  257    257                 4
##  6 C0096A1_GS5           2  257    257                 2
##  7 C0101A1_GS11          4  152.   257                 2
##  8 C0102A2_GS6           3  257    257                 3
##  9 C0179B4_GS7           4  257    257                 4
## 10 Gv101_GS8             4  257    257                 4
## # ℹ 11 more rows
# Before/after MIC filtering
total_original <- nrow(metro_mic_data_file)
cat("Total MIC observations:", total_original, "\n")
## Total MIC observations: 94
filtered_out <- metro_mic_data_file %>%
  filter(grepl("*read",
               MIC, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  count(Strain, sort = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(n_filtered = n)

total_filtered <- sum(filtered_out$n_filtered)
cat("Total MIC observations filtered out:", total_filtered, "\n")
## Total MIC observations filtered out: 14
cat("Remaining MIC observations:", total_original - total_filtered, "\n\n")
## Remaining MIC observations: 80
print(filtered_out)
##         Strain n n_filtered
## 1  JCP7275_GS2 4          4
## 2 JCP8017B_GS3 3          3
## 3  C0096A1_GS5 2          2
## 4    Gv5-1_GS6 2          2
## 5  C0084H9_GS2 1          1
## 6  C0102A2_GS6 1          1
## 7  JCP8108_GS2 1          1
# Create binarized dataframe from mic_numeric (MIC >=32 = 1, <32 = 0)
mic_binarized <- mic_numeric %>%
  mutate(
    MIC_binary = case_when(
      MIC_num >= 32 ~ 1,    # Resistant
      MIC_num < 32 ~ 0,     # Susceptible
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    MIC_original = case_when(
      MIC_num == 257 ~ ">256",
      TRUE ~ as.character(MIC_num)
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(MIC_binary))

# Verify binary distribution
table(mic_binarized$MIC_binary, useNA = "always")
## 
##    0    1 <NA> 
##   15   65    0
prop.table(table(mic_binarized$MIC_binary))
## 
##      0      1 
## 0.1875 0.8125
# Mean binary resistance per strain
resistance_means <- mic_binarized %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_resistant = mean(MIC_binary),
    n_isolates = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain[order(prop_resistant)]))
resistance_means_sorted <- resistance_means[order(resistance_means$n_isolates), ]
print(resistance_means_sorted)
## # A tibble: 21 × 3
##    Strain       prop_resistant n_isolates
##    <fct>                 <dbl>      <int>
##  1 JCP8017B_GS3          0              1
##  2 C0096A1_GS5           1              2
##  3 C0084H9_GS2           0.333          3
##  4 C0102A2_GS6           1              3
##  5 JCP8108_GS2           0              3
##  6 14018_GS1             0              4
##  7 315-A_GS1             1              4
##  8 AMD_GS5               1              4
##  9 C0011E4_GS1           1              4
## 10 C0040C2_GS3           1              4
## # ℹ 11 more rows

Plot replicate information for each strains (Count, Observed Values and Average per Strain)

# Carrying Capacity 
# Replicate values and averages per strain 
p1 <- ggplot(carrying_capacity_data_file, aes(x = Strain, y = maxOD)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_crossbar(data = carrying_capacity_means, aes(y = mean_maxOD, ymin = mean_maxOD, ymax = mean_maxOD),
                width = 0.5, colour = "red", size = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Carrying Capacity: Individual and Averaged Replicate Values", subtitle = paste0("n = ", n_strains, " strains, ", "observations = ", n_observations)) +
  labs(y = "OD600") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))

# Number of replicates per strain 
p2 <- ggplot(carrying_capacity_means,
             aes(x = reorder(Strain, n_isolates), y = n_isolates)) +   
  geom_col(fill = "gray", alpha = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  geom_text(stat = "summary", fun = "sum", 
            aes(label = after_stat(y), vjust = -0.3),
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(resistance_means$n_isolates) + 2, by = 2),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +  # Extra space for labels
  labs(title = "Carrying Capacity: Number of Replicates per Gardnerella Strain", 
       subtitle = "n strains = 22",
       x = "Strain", 
       y = "Replicate Count") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )


#Growth Rate
# Replicate values and averages per strain 
p3 <- ggplot(growth_rate_data_file, aes(x = Strain, y = mSlope)) +   
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_crossbar(data = growth_rate_means, aes(y = mean_growth_rate, ymin = mean_growth_rate, ymax = mean_growth_rate),
                width = 0.5, colour = "red", size = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Growth Rate: Individual and Averaged Replicate Values", subtitle = paste0("n = ", n_strains, " strains, ", "observations = ", n_observations)) +
  labs(y = "μ/hour") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))


# Number of replicates per strain 
p4 <- ggplot(growth_rate_means,
             aes(x = reorder(Strain, n_isolates), y = n_isolates)) +   
  geom_col(fill = "gray", alpha = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  geom_text(stat = "summary", fun = "sum", 
            aes(label = after_stat(y), vjust = -0.3),
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(resistance_means$n_isolates) + 2, by = 2),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +  # Extra space for labels
  labs(title = "Exponential Growth Rate: Number of Replicates per Gardnerella Strain", 
       subtitle = "n strains = 22",
       x = "Strain", 
       y = "Replicate Count") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Percent Biofilm  
p5 <- ggplot(percent_biofilm_transformed, aes(x = Strain, y = arcsq_mPercentOD)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_crossbar(data = percent_biofilm_means, 
                aes(y = mean_arcsq_mPercentOD, ymin = mean_arcsq_mPercentOD, ymax = mean_arcsq_mPercentOD),
                width = 0.5, colour = "red", size = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Percent Biofilm (Arcsin√)", subtitle = paste0("n = ", n_strains, " strains, ", "observations = ", n_observations)) +
  labs(y = "arcsin(√(mPercentOD/100))") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))

p6 <- ggplot(percent_biofilm_means,
             aes(x = reorder(Strain, n_isolates), y = n_isolates)) +   
  geom_col(fill = "gray", alpha = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  geom_text(stat = "summary", fun = "sum", 
            aes(label = after_stat(y), vjust = -0.3),
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(resistance_means$n_isolates) + 2, by = 2),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +  # Extra space for labels
  labs(title = "Percent Biofilm: Number of Replicates per Gardnerella Strain", 
       subtitle = "n strains = 22",
       x = "Strain", 
       y = "Replicate Count") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Safranin (OD450) 
p7 <- ggplot(safranin_od_data_file, aes(x = Strain, y = mSafOD)) +  # adjust
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_crossbar(data = safranin_means, aes(y = mean_safranin_od, ymin = mean_safranin_od, ymax = mean_safranin_od),
                width = 0.5, colour = "red", size = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Biofilm Formation: Safranin OD", subtitle = paste0("n = ", n_strains, " strains, ", "observations = ", n_observations)) +
  labs(y = "OD540") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))

p8 <- ggplot(safranin_means,
             aes(x = reorder(Strain, n_isolates), y = n_isolates)) +   
  geom_col(fill = "gray", alpha = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  geom_text(stat = "summary", fun = "sum", 
            aes(label = after_stat(y), vjust = -0.3),
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(resistance_means$n_isolates) + 2, by = 2),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +  # Extra space for labels
  labs(title = "Percent Biofilm: Number of Replicates per Gardnerella Strain", 
       subtitle = "n strains = 22",
       x = "Strain", 
       y = "Replicate Count") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )


# MDZ-MIC
p9 <- ggplot(metro_mic_filtered, aes(x = Strain, y = MIC)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_crossbar(data = mic_means, aes(y = mean_mic, ymin = mean_mic, ymax = mean_mic),
                width = 0.5, colour = "red", size = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Antibiotic Resistance: MIC after MDZ treatment", subtitle = paste0("n = ", n_strains, " strains, ", "observations = ", n_observations)) +
  labs(y = "MIC") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))

p10 <- ggplot(mic_plot_data, 
                     aes(x = Strain_sorted, y = MIC_num, fill = resistant)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, shape = 21, size = 3.5, 
              alpha = 0.7, stroke = 0.4, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 32, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 1.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "blue", "TRUE" = "red"), 
                    name = "MIC ≥32", labels = c("Susceptible", "Resistant")) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(title = "Individual MIC Values by Gardnerella Strain (n=22)",
       subtitle = "Red dashed = 32 µg/mL resistance cutoff",
       x = "Strain", y = "MIC (µg/mL)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))


p11 <- ggplot(resistance_means_sorted,
             aes(x = reorder(Strain, n_isolates), y = n_isolates)) +   
  geom_col(fill = "gray", alpha = 0.8, color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  geom_text(stat = "summary", fun = "sum", 
            aes(label = after_stat(y), vjust = -0.3),
            size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(resistance_means$n_isolates) + 2, by = 2),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +  # Extra space for labels
  labs(title = "MDZ Susceptibility: Number of Replicates per Gardnerella Strain", 
       subtitle = "filtered out isolates with illegible readings, n strains = 22",
       x = "Strain", 
       y = "Replicate Count") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )


# Plot: mean binary resistance per strain
p12 <- ggplot(resistance_means_sorted,
                             aes(reorder(Strain, n_isolates), y = prop_resistant,
                                 fill = prop_resistant > 0.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 4, alpha = 1.0, stroke = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "blue", "TRUE" = "red"),
                    name = "Average Binarized MIC Value", labels = c("≤0.5", ">0.5")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1)) +
  labs(title = "MDZ Susceptibility: Average of Binarized MIC", 
       subtitle = ">=32µg/mL MIC = 1 (Resistant) and <32µg/mL MIC = 0 (Susceptible), n strains = 22",
       x = "Strain", y = "Average of Binarized MIC") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold")
  )


# View plots
p1; p2; p3; p4; p5; p6; p7; p8; p9; p10; p11; p12

Average the phenotype values across replicates per strain

carrying_capacity_data <- carrying_capacity_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>% summarise(mean_maxOD = mean(maxOD, na.rm = TRUE))

cc_vector <- setNames(carrying_capacity_data$mean_maxOD, carrying_capacity_data$Strain)
cc_range <- range(cc_vector, na.rm = TRUE)
cc_cv_between <- (sd(cc_vector) / mean(cc_vector)) 
cat("\ncarrying_capacity_data\n")
## 
## carrying_capacity_data
cat("Mean: ", mean(cc_vector), "\n")
## Mean:  0.5241648
cat("SD: ", sd(cc_vector), "\n")
## SD:  0.1125457
cat("CV: ", cc_cv_between, "\n")
## CV:  0.2147143
growth_rate_data <- growth_rate_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>% summarise(mean_mSlope = mean(mSlope, na.rm = TRUE))
gr_vector <- setNames(growth_rate_data$mean_mSlope, growth_rate_data$Strain)
gr_range <- range(gr_vector, na.rm = TRUE)
gr_cv_between <- (sd(gr_vector) / mean(gr_vector)) 
cat("\ngrowth_rate_data\n")
## 
## growth_rate_data
cat("Mean: ", mean(gr_vector), "\n")
## Mean:  0.6665317
cat("SD: ", sd(gr_vector), "\n")
## SD:  0.1458267
cat("CV: ", gr_cv_between, "\n")
## CV:  0.2187843
# Transform percent_biofilm by applying asin(sqrt(x))
percent_biofilm_od_data <- percent_biofilm_od_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain),
         arcsq_mPercentOD = asin(sqrt(mPercentOD/100))) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>% 
  summarise(mean_arcsq_mPercentOD = mean(arcsq_mPercentOD, na.rm = TRUE))   
pb_vector <- setNames(percent_biofilm_od_data$mean_arcsq_mPercentOD, percent_biofilm_od_data$Strain)
pb_range <- range(pb_vector, na.rm = TRUE)
pb_cv_between <- (sd(pb_vector) / mean(pb_vector)) 
cat("\npercent_biofilm_od_data\n")
## 
## percent_biofilm_od_data
cat("Mean: ", mean(pb_vector), "\n")
## Mean:  1.000254
cat("SD: ", sd(pb_vector), "\n")
## SD:  0.2323065
cat("CV: ", pb_cv_between, "\n")
## CV:  0.2322475
safranin_od_data <- safranin_od_data_file %>%
  mutate(Strain = as.character(Strain)) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>% summarise(mean_mSafOD = mean(mSafOD, na.rm = TRUE))
sf_vector <- setNames(safranin_od_data$mean_mSafOD, safranin_od_data$Strain)
sf_range <- range(sf_vector, na.rm = TRUE)
sf_cv_between <- (sd(sf_vector) / mean(sf_vector)) 
cat("\nsafranin_od_data\n")
## 
## safranin_od_data
cat("Mean: ", mean(sf_vector), "\n")
## Mean:  0.1284987
cat("SD: ", sd(sf_vector), "\n")
## SD:  0.1051148
cat("CV: ", sf_cv_between, "\n")
## CV:  0.8180221
# MIC: Mean binary resistance per strain
mic_data <- metro_mic_data_file %>%
   filter(!grepl("*read",
                 MIC, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(
    Strain = as.character(Strain),
    MIC_binary = case_when(
      grepl("^>256$", MIC) ~ 1,
      grepl("^[0-9]+$", MIC) & as.numeric(MIC) >= 32 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_MIC_binary = mean(MIC_binary, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_isolates = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Strain = factor(Strain, levels = Strain[order(mean_MIC_binary)])   
  )

mic_vector <- setNames(mic_data$mean_MIC_binary, mic_data$Strain)
mic_range <- range(mic_vector, na.rm = TRUE)

mic_cv_between <- sd(mic_vector) / mean(mic_vector)

cat("\nmic_data\n")
## 
## mic_data
cat("Mean: ", mean(mic_vector), "\n")
## Mean:  0.7837302
cat("SD: ", sd(mic_vector), "\n")
## SD:  0.37768
cat("CV: ", mic_cv_between, "\n")
## CV:  0.4819006

Using t-test to identify the minimum pH value where non-zero growth (OD600 >0.01) occurred for each strain

pH_growth_data <- pH_growth_data_file %>%
  group_by(Strain, pH) %>%
  t_test(mOD ~ 1, mu = 0.01, alternative = "greater") %>%
  add_significance("p") %>%
  filter(p.signif != "ns") %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  filter(pH == min(pH)) %>%
  mutate(pH = as.numeric(pH))
ph_vector <- setNames(pH_growth_data$pH, pH_growth_data$Strain)
ph_range <- range(ph_vector, na.rm = TRUE)
ph_cv <- (sd(ph_vector) / mean(ph_vector))  
cat("pH_growth_data")
## pH_growth_data
cat("Mean: ", mean(ph_vector), "\n")
## Mean:  4.886364
cat("SD: ", sd(ph_vector), "\n")
## SD:  0.4611533
cat("CV: ", ph_cv, "\n")
## CV:  0.09437555
pH_growth_data <- update_strain_gs(pH_growth_data)
n_strains <- length(unique(pH_growth_data$Strain))
n_observations <-length(pH_growth_data$pH)

Rename complete-numeric strains (e.g. 14018)

# Strain 14018 not present in: pb_vector, sf_vector (did not pass QC for these experiments)
vecs <- list(ph=ph_vector, cc=cc_vector, gr=gr_vector, mic=mic_vector)
vecs[] <- lapply(vecs, function(v) {
  idx <- names(v) == "14018"   
  if(any(idx)) names(v)[idx] <- "S14018"   
  v
})

({cc_vector<<-vecs$cc; gr_vector<<-vecs$gr; ph_vector<<-vecs$ph; mic_vecotr<<-vecs$mic})
##     14018_GS1     315-A_GS1       AMD_GS5   C0011E4_GS1   C0040C2_GS3 
##     0.0000000     1.0000000     1.0000000     1.0000000     1.0000000 
##   C0056B5_GS8   C0084H9_GS2   C0093B3_GS4   C0096A1_GS5  C0101A1_GS11 
##     1.0000000     0.3333333     1.0000000     1.0000000     1.0000000 
##   C0102A2_GS6   C0179B4_GS7 CMW7778B_GS12     Gv101_GS8     Gv5-1_GS6 
##     1.0000000     1.0000000     0.5000000     1.0000000     1.0000000 
##   JCP7275_GS2  JCP8017B_GS3   JCP8066_GS4   JCP8108_GS2     UM224_GS6 
##     1.0000000     0.0000000     1.0000000     0.0000000     1.0000000 
##      UM35_GS4 
##     0.6250000
names(ph_vector)
##  [1] "S14018"   "315-A"    "AMD"      "C0011E4"  "C0040C2"  "C0056B5" 
##  [7] "C0084H9"  "C0093B3"  "C0096A1"  "C0100B2"  "C0101A1"  "C0102A2" 
## [13] "C0179B4"  "CMW7778B" "Gv101"    "Gv5-1"    "JCP7275"  "JCP8017B"
## [19] "JCP8066"  "JCP8108"  "UM224"    "UM35"

Phenotype Distribution Visualizations

# Okabe–Ito palette  
# Orange       #E69F00
# Sky blue     #56B4E9
# Bluish green #009E73
# Yellow       #F0E442
# Blue         #0072B2
# Vermillion   #D55E00
# Reddish purp #CC79A7
# Grey         #999999
# Black        #000000

p1 <- ggplot(carrying_capacity_data, aes(x = mean_maxOD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, color = "black", fill = "#0072B2") +  # blue
  geom_text(
    stat = "bin", binwidth = 0.05,
    aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) == 0, "", after_stat(count))),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.8),
    color = "black", size = 5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(cc_range[1] - 0.05, cc_range[2] + 0.05)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty(cc_range, n = 10)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Carrying Capacities",
    subtitle = "Measured as max OD600 over incubation period; n = 22",
    x        = "Average max OD600",
    y        = "Number of Strains"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

p2 <- ggplot(growth_rate_data, aes(x = mean_mSlope)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, color = "black", fill = "#E69F00") +  # orange
  geom_text(
    stat = "bin", binwidth = 0.05,
    aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) == 0, "", after_stat(count))),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.8),
    color = "black", size = 5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(gr_range[1] - 0.05, gr_range[2] + 0.05)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty(gr_range, n = 10)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Exponential Growth Rate",
    subtitle = "n = 22",
    x        = "Average growth rates",
    y        = "Number of Strains"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

p3 <- ggplot(pH_growth_data, aes(x = pH)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.25, color = "black", fill = "#009E73") +  # bluish green
  geom_text(
    stat = "bin", binwidth = 0.25,
    aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) == 0, "", after_stat(count))),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.8),
    color = "black", size = 5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(ph_range[1] - 0.1, ph_range[2] + 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty(ph_range, n = 5)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Minimum pH with Growth",
    subtitle = "Lowest pH (3.5–6) with OD600 ≥ 0.01; n = 22",
    x        = "Average minimum pH",
    y        = "Number of Strains"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

p4 <- ggplot(percent_biofilm_od_data, aes(x = mean_arcsq_mPercentOD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.04, color = "black", fill = "#D55E00") +  # vermillion
  geom_text(
    stat = "bin", binwidth = 0.04,
    aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) > 0, after_stat(count), "")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.8),
    color = "black", size = 4
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(pb_range[1] - 0.1, pb_range[2] + 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty(pb_range, n = 10)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Biofilm Formation: Percent Growth as Biofilm",
    subtitle = paste("n =", nrow(percent_biofilm_od_data)),
    x        = "Mean Arcsine-Sqrt(Percent Biofilm)",
    y        = "Number of Strains"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

p5 <- ggplot(safranin_od_data, aes(x = mean_mSafOD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, color = "black", fill = "#CC79A7") +  # reddish purple
  geom_text(
    stat = "bin", binwidth = 0.05,
    aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) == 0, "", after_stat(count))),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.8),
    color = "black", size = 5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(sf_range[1] - 0.1, sf_range[2] + 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = pretty(sf_range, n = 10)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Biofilm Formation: OD450 of Safranin Stain",
    subtitle = "n = 21",
    x        = "Average OD450",
    y        = "Number of Strains"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

p6 <- ggplot(mic_data, aes(x = mean_MIC_binary)) +
  geom_histogram(
    binwidth = 0.1,
    color    = "black",
    fill     = "#F0E442",    
    boundary = 0.05
  ) +
  geom_text(
    stat     = "bin",
    binwidth = 0.1,
    aes(label = ifelse(after_stat(count) == 0, "", after_stat(count))),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.8),
    hjust    = 0.5,
    color    = "black",
    size     = 4.5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1)) +
  labs(
    title    = "MDZ Susceptibility: Average of Binarized MIC",
    subtitle = "≥32 µg/mL MIC → 1 (Resistant), <32 µg/mL MIC → 0 (Susceptible); n strains = 22",
    x        = "Average of Binarized MIC Across Strain Isolates",
    y        = "Number of Strains"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
    plot.title    = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

print(p1); print(p2); print(p3); print(p4); print(p5); print(p6)
